arguments.expression: console.log('Testing createElement and appendChild...'); try { const div = document.createElement('div'); console.log('div created:', !!div); div.id = 'test-element'; console.log('id set'); div.textContent = 'Test Content'; console.log('textContent set'); if (document.body.appendChild) { console.log('appendChild method exists'); document.body.appendChild(div); console.log('appendChild called'); const found = document.getElementById('test-element'); console.log('element found after appendChild:', !!found); found ? found.textContent : 'Element not found'; } else { 'appendChild method not available'; } } catch (e) { console.log('Error:', e.message); 'Error: ' + e.message; }
